summary: Senior data and analytics engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience spanning SQL-driven reporting, data quality, financial and operational analytics, stakeholder dashboards, QA/testing, documentation, and production support. Strong background translating business requirements into reliable data models, reports, and analytics workflows for regulated, high-scale enterprise environments. Especially effective in roles requiring complex SQL, stakeholder-facing reporting systems, data validation, operational insight, and disciplined documentation.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported SQL/Python-based data pipelines and reporting workflows that transformed raw infrastructure telemetry into actionable operational and financial planning insights for senior stakeholders.

Designed optimized Oracle schemas, historical retention structures, and reporting datasets to support trend analysis, executive reporting, and forecasting use cases in a regulated financial-services environment.
Wrote and tuned complex SQL queries for analytics, reconciliation, validation, and reporting needs, with attention to performance, data correctness, and repeatable production execution.
Developed QA and validation routines to identify missing, inconsistent, or anomalous data before downstream reporting and capacity-planning consumption.
Created stakeholder-facing dashboards and reports using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, and tabular reporting outputs to communicate operational risk, utilization, and capacity trends.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, analytics, and leadership teams to refine requirements, document workflows, validate outputs, and maintain trusted reporting systems.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for customer-facing hospitality systems, ensuring reliable operational visibility for business-critical digital services.
Led the FAST project by analyzing real-user and synthetic performance data to produce actionable recommendations for engineering and business stakeholders.
Built analytics outputs from monitoring and performance data to support optimization decisions, service reliability reviews, and cross-functional troubleshooting.
Documented system behavior, monitoring coverage, and technical changes during a Dynatrace upgrade and TLS 1.2 security transition with zero regression in production monitoring.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as enterprise CA APM SME for a large financial-services client, supporting reporting, dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and production monitoring standards across distributed systems.
Built Perl/Korn Shell extraction and reporting automation that replaced manual weekly exports and improved repeatability of operational analytics deliverables.
Designed management modules, dashboards, and SLA threshold reporting used by technical and non-technical stakeholders to understand system health and performance trends.
Produced technical documentation and training materials adopted by internal teams and client stakeholders to improve system understanding and operational continuity.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction performance and data correctness.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing framework to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to support phased migration, QA, and production cutover activities.
Applied SQL, relational modeling, database performance analysis, and system documentation practices to support reliable large-scale data migration.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.SQL & Databases: Advanced SQL, complex queries, Oracle, PL/SQL, SQL Server concepts, PostgreSQL, relational database design, stored procedure concepts, indexing and performance tuning awareness
skills.Analytics & Reporting: Operational reporting, financial and capacity analytics, stakeholder dashboards, BI-style reporting layers, executive reporting, data visualization, Excel-style analytical workflows
skills.Data Quality & Testing: Data validation, reconciliation, QA checks, unit-testing discipline, anomaly detection, completeness checks, root-cause analysis, production issue triage
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, Python automation, Pandas, data modeling, data warehousing, metadata management, data dictionaries, pipeline documentation
skills.Visualization & BI: Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Qlik exposure; Power BI/Tableau concepts and transferable dashboard/reporting experience
skills.Enterprise Delivery: Requirements analysis, stakeholder communication, Agile delivery, release support, production support, vendor coordination, technical documentation, mentoring
skills.Healthcare Analytics Bridge: Healthcare analytics interest, regulated-data mindset, privacy/security awareness, clinical/financial reporting adaptability; Epic Clarity awareness only

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting and Analytics Platform
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark and Streamlit analytics platform that transformed operational telemetry into forecasting insights, dashboards, and stakeholder-facing reports. The work emphasized trusted data preparation, validation, trend analysis, and explainable reporting for infrastructure planning decisions.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Parquet concepts to support analytics-ready datasets, optimized storage, query performance, and documented data access patterns.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based automation pipeline with structured JSON artifacts, validation gates, semantic duplicate detection, and quality checks for repeatable document generation and workflow tracking.
